mapper.select: SELECT so.id, so.order_no, so.operator_id, u.real_name AS operator_name, so.total_amount, so.status, so.remark, so.created_at FROM sale_order so INNER JOIN sys_user u ON so.operator_id = u.id ORDER BY so.id DESC

SELECT so.id, so.order_no, so.operator_id, u.real_name AS operator_name, so.total_amount, so.status, so.remark, so.created_at FROM sale_order so INNER JOIN sys_user u ON so.operator_id = u.id WHERE so.id = #{id}
